title: Squirrel Removal in Great Kills, Staten Island | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Great Kills, Staten Island. Humane extraction, damage repair & prevention. Licensed experts serving 10308. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Great Kills residents know that squirrels are abundant in this tree-lined Staten Island neighborhood, but when they invade your attic or walls, they become a serious problem. Our professional squirrel removal service provides humane extraction and comprehensive exclusion for homes and businesses throughout Great Kills, from the waterfront properties near Great Kills Park to the residential streets surrounding Hylan Boulevard. We combine effective removal techniques with long-term prevention to protect your property from recurring squirrel invasions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Great Kills homeowners for years with specialized knowledge of local squirrel behavior and building vulnerabilities common to Staten Island properties. Our licensed technicians provide same-day emergency service, humane removal methods, complete attic restoration, and warranties that give you lasting peace of mind.
localContext: Great Kills homes, particularly those near Great Kills Park and along the tree-canopied streets off Hylan Boulevard, are especially susceptible to squirrel intrusions due to mature oak and maple trees providing easy roof access. The mix of older Cape Cod-style homes and brick colonials in the neighborhood often have the exact entry points squirrels exploit, including roof vents, fascia gaps, and chimney openings.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Great Kills?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Great Kills typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. A single squirrel with one entry point will be on the lower end, while multiple squirrels, extensive attic damage, or multiple access points requiring repair will increase the cost. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before any work begins.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Great Kills home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Great Kills and can typically begin the removal process within 24 hours of your call. The complete removal process usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and whether there are babies present. We use one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to leave but not return, ensuring humane and effective removal.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause to Great Kills homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels can cause extensive damage to Great Kills homes including chewed electrical wiring (fire hazard), damaged insulation, torn roof shingles, destroyed soffits and fascia, contaminated attics from droppings and urine, and structural wood damage from gnawing. They're particularly active in fall and spring when seeking nesting sites, and the damage can cost thousands if left unaddressed.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees on squirrel exclusion work in Great Kills?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive warranties on all exclusion and sealing work performed in Great Kills. Our guarantee covers re-entry at sealed points, and we use heavy-duty materials like galvanized steel mesh and professional-grade sealants that squirrels cannot chew through. We also offer follow-up inspections to ensure your home remains squirrel-free and all entry points stay secure.
